conditions: Win 15 Dirt races. (Trackblazer only)

Win the URA Finals Final.
Win at least 5 G1 races and the URA Finals. Earn a total of at least 320,000 fans.

Win 7 G1 races.

Win 10 G1 races.

Buy at least 20 items from the Special Shop. Complete the career. (Trackblazer only)

Trigger 10 Aoharu Spirit Explosions. (Unity Cup only)
Win Aoharu Hai and URA Finals. Reach Team Rank S. (Unity Cup only)
Trigger at least 65 Aoharu Special Trainings. Complete the career. (Unity Cup only)
Receive the team title "Legend". (Unity Cup only)
Win the Tokyo Yushun (Japanese Derby), and the Tenno Sho (Autumn) twice. Enter all races with a Mood Level of Perfect. Don't fail a single training. (Mejiro Ardan only)

Inherit the memories of a parent who won the Asahi Hai Futurity Stakes and reached 1200 or more speed. Win the Asahi Hai Futurity Stakes, Satsuki Sho, Tokyo Yushun (Japanese Derby), and Japan Cup. (Sakura Chiyono O only)
Win 7 or more G1 races, including the Kikuka Sho, Tenno Sho (Spring), Takarazuka Kinen, Tenno Sho (Autumn Year 3) and Arima Kinen (Year 3). Earn a total of at least 480,000 fans. (Kitasan Black only)
Participate in 12 or more G1 races. Win at least 4 graded races of 2500m or longer, including the Kikuka Sho and Arima Kinen (Year 3). (Matikanetannhauser only)
Inherit memories from a parent whose parents won a total of at least 11 G1 races. Place higher than Special Week, Seiun Sky, Grass Wonder and El Condor Pasa 3 times. (King Halo only)
Finish 3rd in at least 3 G1 races. Earn a total of at least 320,000 fans. (Nice Nature only)

Win the Hanshin Juvenile Fillies, Oka Sho, Japanese Oaks and Shuka Sho as a Late Surger while being most popular. Win the Queen Elizabeth II Cup twice. Earn a total of at least 240,000 fans. (Mejiro Dober only)
Without losing any races in between, win 9 or more graded races including the Tenno Sho (Spring), Takarazuka Kinen and Arima Kinen. (Meisho Doto only)
Participate in at least 15 G1 or G2 races with a Mood level of Great. Win at least 3 G2 or higher races in a row, including the Kikuka Sho. (Matikanefukukitaru only)
Earn a total of at least 550,000 fans. (Haru Urara only)
Win the Satsuki Sho as an End Closer, overtaking at least 4 people in the last straight. Win the Tenno Sho (Spring) as an End Closer. Reach 1200 or more Guts. (Narita Taishin only)
Win the Japan Cup and Tenno Sho (Spring). Win the Tenno Sho (Autumn) with a Mood level of Perfect twice. Win against Gold Ship at least 3 times. (Tosen Jordan only)
Without losing any races in between, win at least 9 dirt graded races as a Front Runner, including the JBC Classic, Teio Sho and Tokyo Daishoten. (Smart Falcon only)
Win the Kikuka Sho with difference of at least 5 lengths. Win 6 graded races with a length of 2400m or higher, including the Tenno Sho (Spring). (Super Creek only)
Win 11 races with a length of 1400m or lower. Win the Sprinters Stakes (Year 3) with a difference of at least 4 lengths while being the most popular. (Sakura Bakushin O only)

Win the Hanshin Juvenile Fillies. Be at a Mood level of Perfect and don't have either the "Slow Metabolism", "Skin Outbreak" or "Slacker" condition for all races. Raise the level of all trainings to at least 3. Complete the career. (Gold City only)
Inherit the memories of a parent who won the Takamatsunomiya Kinen. Win the Japanese Oaks, Shuka Sho and Queen Elizabeth II Cup while being undefeated. (Kawakami Princess only)
Win at least 9 races with a length of of 1200m, including the Sprinters Stakes and Takamatsunomiya Kinen. Earn a total of at least 240,000 fans. (Curren Chan only)
Win the Tokyo Yushun (Japanese Derby) and Tenno Sho (Autumn) as a Late Surger. Complete the Career with the Fast Learner condition. (Eishin Flash only)
Win the Yayoi Sho, Satsuki Sho, Tokyo Yushun (Japanese Derby) and Kikuka Sho as the most popular. Win the Arima Kinen (Year 2). Earn a total of at least 240,000 fans. (Winning Ticket only)
Win the Satsuki Sho, Tokyo Yushun (Japanese Derby) and Takarazuka Kinen as most popular. Place higher than TM Opera O, Narita Top Road and Meisho Doto at least 3 times. (Admire Vega only)
Inherit memories from a parent with at least S rank. Win the Hopeful Stakes, Yayoi Sho and Satsuki Sho without losing any other races. Reach 1200 or more Speed. (Agnes Tachyon only)
Participate in at least 23 graded races. Win the Kikuka Sho and Tenno Sho (Spring) as the 2nd most or most popular. Earn a total of at least 320,000 fans. (Rice Shower only)
Win the Yasuda Kinen and Mile Championship. Win the Sprinters Stakes twice. Reach 1200 or more Power. (Hishi Akebono only)
Win a G1 race against a Mejiro at least once. Win the Kikuka Sho, Takarazuka Kinen and Arima Kinen. Earn a total of at least 240,000 fans. (Mejiro Ryan only)
Win the Asahi Hai Futurity Stakes, Satsuki Sho and Tokyo Yushun (Japanese Derby) while being undefeated and the most popular as a Front Runner. Reach 1200 or more Stamina. (Mihono Bourbon only)
Win the Kikuka Sho, Arima Kinen twice and Tenno Sho (Spring) as a Late Surger. Reach 1200 or more Stamina. (Manhattan Cafe only)
Win a G1 race as a Front Runner, Pace Chaser, Late Surger and End Closer. (Mayano Top Gun only)
Finish 2nd or better in every race you participate in. Win the Kikuka Sho, Tenno Sho (Spring) and Takarazuka Kinen. Clear all training objectives. Complete the career. (Biwa Hayahide only)
Win the Shuka Sho, Queen Elizabeth II Cup and Arima Kinen (Classic) while being undefeated and most popular. Win the Shuka Sho with a difference of at least 3 1/2 lengths. (Fine Motion only)
Win at least 8 graded races, including the Tenno Sho (Spring), Takarazuka Kinen (Senior), Tenno Sho (Autumn Year 3). Earn a total of at least 240,000 fans. (Tamamo Cross only)

Win the Satsuki Sho, Arima Kinen (Year 2) and Tenno Sho (Spring) as a Front Runner. Win the Kikuka Sho as a Front Runner while staying in the lead from the 200m mark to the goal line. (Seiun Sky only)
Win the Japan Dirt Derby, Mile Championship, February Stakes, Yasuda Kinen, Tenno Sho (Autumn) and Arima Kinen (Year 3). (Agnes Digital only)
Inherit memories from a parent that won the Japanese Oaks. Earn a total of at least 320,000 fans. Win the Japanese Oaks and Tenno Sho (Autumn). (Air Groove only)
Win the Satsuki Sho, Tokyo Yushun (Japanese Derby) and Kikuka Sho while being undefeated. Win the Japan Cup and Tenno Sho (Spring). Win the Arima Kinen twice. (Symboli Rudolf only)

Win the Satsuki Sho with a difference of at least 3 1/2 lengths. Win the Tokyo Yushun (Japanese Derby) with a difference of at least 5 lengths. Win the Kikuka Sho with a difference of at least 7 lengths. Win the Arima Kinen twice. (Narita Brian only)
Without losing any races in between, win at least 8 races including the Tenno Sho (Spring), Takarazuka Kinen, Tenno Sho (Autumn), Japan Cup, and Arima Kinen. (TM Opera O only)
Finish 2nd or better in every race. Win the Japan Cup (Year 2) as a Pace Chaser. Earn a total of at least 320,000 fans. Complete the career. (El Condor Pasa only)
Win the Kikuka Sho and Tenno Sho (Spring). Reach 1200 or more Stamina. Earn a total of at least 320,000 fans. (Mejiro McQueen only)

Without losing any races in between, win at least 6 graded races in which you are the most popular as a End Closer, and overtake 5 others on the last straight in at least 2 of them. (Hishi Amazon only)
Win the Asahi Hai Futurity Stakes, Arima Kinen (Year 2), Takarazuka Kinen (Year 3) and Arima Kinen (Year 3) with a Mood level of Good or lower. (Grass Wonder only)
Win 5 graded races, including the Unicorn Stakes and Yasuda Kinen, with one of them being in rainy weather. Win the Mile Championship with a difference of at least 5 lengths. (Taiki Shuttle only)

Inherit memories from a parent that won the Satsuki Sho. Finish 2nd or better in every race you participate in. Win 10 graded races, including the Oka Sho, Shuka Sho and Queen Elizabeth II Cup. (Daiwa Scarlet only)
Win 7 G1 races, including the Tokyo Yushun (Japanese Derby), Yasuda Kinen, Japan Cup, Tenno Sho (Autumn), and Victoria Mile. (Vodka only)

Win 8 consecutive races while being undefeated. Have an average win length difference of at least 7 lengths. (Maruzensky only)

Inherit memories from a parent that won at least 7 G1 races. Be the most popular in at least 4 G1 races. Win the Satsuki Sho, Tokyo Yushun (Japanese Derby) and Arima Kinen (Year 3) while being undefeated. (Tokai Teio only)
